calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-02-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Larry Nakahara for (petitioner) Kenneth Wakisaka.

Mr. Nakahara reported that this is a pay on death account, that the decedent took his client to the bank and introduced him, that they do not know who the funds were paid to but think it was the stepmother, that they would like to find out prior to filing an 850 petition and that they do not see a conflict of interest. The court asked if there was a written renunciation by the surviving spouse. Mr. Nakahara stated that they have not specifically told her and that they have decided to notice her. The petition for letters of administration was taken under submission.

Judge: Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
